---
title: "Vincent Martinetto"
meta:
  - name: description
    content: "Profile of Vincent Martinetto from the Machine Learning for Materials Design (ML4MD) Lab."
  - name: keywords
    content: "ML4MD Lab, People, ZVincent Martinetto"
sortby: "Martinetto, Vincent"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher"
image: ../person-circle.svg # Ensure this image has appropriate alt text if used directly in content
toc: false
#resources: 
#  - "cv.pdf"
started: "2025"
ended: "Current"
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
  #links:
  #  - icon: file-earmark-text
  #    text: CV
  #    href: ./people/phd_students/cv.pdf
---

:::{#person-profile}
:::

<!---
## Biography
## Experience
## Education
-->
